_comment: Single source of truth for the capability-seam grid on the homepage. Seeded from the original hand-written copy. The grid HTML between the <!-- seams:start --> / <!-- seams:end --> markers in index.html is GENERATED from this file — do not hand-edit it. Edit a tagline here and run `node scripts/gen-seams.mjs`. The canonical long-term home for these taglines is each prx package's package.json; `node scripts/gen-seams.mjs --emit-seed` produces the payload to promote them upstream, and `--reconcile` checks this set against prx.
